label: Heliopause Parlor
description: Heliopause Parlor serves as a private residence set into Seamline Concord’s basalt-glass terracework, its rooms oriented along the city’s calibrated sightlines to the auroral girdle. Interior walls are paneled in dark vitrified stone, with mirror-slag filigree that repeats Lacrymara’s seam-line bands in thin, copper-white traces. Electrostatic baffles at the thresholds hold the ever-present glass dust in disciplined drifts, preserving sharply defined surfaces and softening sound into the Expanse’s characteristic hush. A narrow cistern niche along the inner hall maintains a reflective basin used for light-measure and household navigation within twilight gradients.
